no-wikipedia:Observatoire de la Capitale.notes: Searched en.wikipedia.org: no standalone English article exists for the Observatoire de la Capitale observation deck; the only related page is Edifice Marie-Guyart (the office tower housing it, a different subject), and the French 'Observatoire de la capitale' page is merely a redirect into that building article, so it does not qualify.
